title: Woman stabbed 19 times, man arrested
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 42-year-old woman is in...
bodyText:
MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 42-year-old woman is in a stable condition after she was stabbed 19 times in a brutal attack in KwaNonqaba on Friday, 8 November.

The man alleged to have attacked her has been arrested.


> The suspect is expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court tomorrow, 13 November, on a charge of attempted murder.


Read more on www.mosselbayadvertiser.com

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
